help.title: Keyboard shortcuts
help.description: Every shortcut registered in the app, grouped by section.
help.emptyDescription: Shortcuts get registered as features load. This dialog will fill in once you've used the app a bit.

customSymbols.title: Custom Symbols
customSymbols.description: Build custom indices from multiple components with weighted aggregation.
customSymbols.dialogDescription: Compose synthetic indices from multiple symbols (equal-weight, market-cap, capped, sqrt or manual weighting).
customSymbols.name: Name

marginInfo.title: Margin Info
marginInfo.initialMarginTooltip: Required margin to open a position (50% for stocks)
marginInfo.maintenanceMarginTooltip: Minimum equity to maintain position (25% for stocks)

tooltip.unavailable: This stock is not available for short selling

settings.title: Settings
settings.dialogDescription: Account, security, notifications, and per-feature defaults.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Public information shown across the app.
profile.name: Display name

avatar.helper: PNG, JPG, WEBP or GIF up to {{maxKb}}KB.
avatar.colorLabel: Or pick a color for your initials

email.title: Email
email.description: Used for sign-in, security alerts and verification codes.
email.label: Email address

errors.invalidFileType: Unsupported file type. Use PNG, JPG, WEBP or GIF.

password.title: Password
password.description: Change your account password. Other devices will be signed out.
password.tooShort: Password must be at least {{count}} characters

twoFactor.title: Two-factor authentication
twoFactor.description: Receive a verification code by email each time you sign in.
twoFactor.requiresVerifiedEmail: Verify your email first to enable two-factor authentication.

sessions.title: Active sessions
sessions.description: Devices currently signed in to your account.

agentTrading.title: AI Agent Trading
agentTrading.description: Allow MCP-connected agents (Claude Code, ChatGPT desktop, custom agents) to drive trade execution on a per-wallet basis. Read-only inspection always works; this toggle gates write operations only.
agentTrading.warning: Enabling this lets connected agents place real orders on your behalf. Every action is logged in the audit trail. Disable any time.
agentTrading.noWallets: No wallets configured yet. Add a wallet to control per-wallet agent trading.
agentTrading.perWalletHelper: Allow agents to place / cancel / modify orders on this wallet
agentTrading.confirmTitle: Enable agent trading on this wallet?
agentTrading.confirmBody: MCP-connected agents will be able to place real orders on this wallet. Every action will be recorded in the audit log. You can revoke this any time.

agentActivity.title: AI Agent Activity
agentActivity.description: Audit trail of every action taken by MCP-connected agents. Records succeed, fail, and denied (gate off) calls with timing.

toasts.title: In-app notifications
toasts.orderUpdatesHelper: Toasts when orders are filled, cancelled or modified.
toasts.setupDetectedHelper: Toasts when watchers detect a new trade setup.

sound.title: Sound
sound.enableHelper: Plays a brief sound for high-priority events.

comingSoon.title: More notification options coming soon
comingSoon.description: Email and desktop push notifications are on the roadmap.

dataManagement.title: Data Management
dataManagement.exportDescription: Save all data as JSON file for backup
dataManagement.importDescription: Load a previously exported data file
dataManagement.confirmClear: Are you sure you want to delete all data? This action cannot be undone.
dataManagement.importError: Failed to import data. Please check the file format.

autoUpdate.title: Application updates
autoUpdate.description: Keep MarketMind up-to-date with the latest features and fixes.
autoUpdate.checkAutomaticallyDescription: Automatically check for new versions in the background
autoUpdate.downloadAutomaticallyDescription: Automatically download new versions when available

maintenance.title: Kline Maintenance
maintenance.description: Detect and repair missing or corrupted candles across all active pairs

cooldowns.title: Check Intervals
cooldowns.description: How often the system automatically checks for gaps and corrupted data

storage.title: Storage
storage.description: Disk space used by kline (candlestick) data.
storage.confirmDescription: All downloaded candlestick data will be permanently deleted. The system will re-download only what is needed for active charts, watchers and positions.

heatmap.title: Liquidity Heatmap
heatmap.description: Symbols that always collect order book depth for the heatmap, even without a chart open.

layouts.title: Layout History
layouts.description: Daily snapshots of your tabs and layout presets, retained for 30 days. Restore any prior snapshot if your current state was lost or you want to go back.
layouts.empty: No snapshots yet — the first one is created the next day after you change your layout.
layouts.restoreConfirmBody: Your current layout will be archived to history before this snapshot becomes active. You can always restore back to it.

chart.tipsRealtime: Changes are applied immediately with a 300ms debounce
chart.tipsReset: Click 'Reset to Defaults' to restore default chart settings
chart.rightMarginHelper: Space reserved on the right side of the chart (px)
chart.volumeHeightRatioHelper: Height of volume bars relative to chart (0–1)
chart.lineWidthHelper: Thickness of the current price line (px)
chart.lineStyleHelper: Style of the current price line
chart.enableShiftAltOrderEntryHelper: Hold Shift to preview long orders or Alt/Option to preview short orders when clicking on the chart
chart.liquidityIntensityHelper: Use a single warm color ramp for both bid and ask — brighter cells mean higher liquidity; side is inferred from position relative to price

tradingSimulator.title: Trading Simulator Settings
tradingSimulator.description: Manage your trading simulator data and settings.

dangerZone.title: Danger Zone
dangerZone.description: Clearing all data will permanently delete all wallets, orders, and trading history. This action cannot be undone.

tradingSimulator.confirmClearAll: Are you sure you want to clear all trading data? This action cannot be undone.

algorithmicAutoTrading.title: Algorithmic Auto-Trading
algorithmicAutoTrading.description: Configure automatic order execution based on detected trading setups.

status.title: Auto-Trading Status
status.description: Enable or disable automatic order placement when trading setups are detected on the chart.
status.active: Auto-trading is currently active - orders will be created automatically
status.inactive: Auto-trading is currently inactive - setups will only be detected and displayed
status.info: This feature works with the setup detection system. Make sure to enable at least one setup type in the Setup Detection tab before activating auto-trading.

tpMode.title: Take Profit Calculation
tpMode.description: Select how take profit targets are calculated for trading setups.

fibonacciLevel.title: Fibonacci Target Level
fibonacciLevel.autoDescription: Dynamically selects level based on trend strength (ADX), volatility (ATR) and volume
fibonacciLevel.conservativeDescription: Conservative target - best for ranging markets or weak trends (ADX < 20)
fibonacciLevel.moderateDescription: Moderate extension - best for normal trend conditions (ADX 20-30)
fibonacciLevel.moderateAggressiveDescription: Slightly aggressive - good for trending markets with moderate momentum
fibonacciLevel.balancedDescription: Balanced target - halfway between retracement and golden ratio
fibonacciLevel.aggressiveDescription: Golden ratio - best for strong trends with volume confirmation (ADX > 30)
fibonacciLevel.extendedDescription: Double extension - for very strong breakouts and momentum moves
fibonacciLevel.veryExtendedDescription: Very extended - for exceptionally strong trends with sustained momentum
fibonacciLevel.superExtendedDescription: Maximum Fibonacci extension - for parabolic moves and exceptional momentum
fibonacciLevel.tripleDescription: Triple extension - for sustained breakout trends with extreme momentum
fibonacciLevel.ultraExtendedDescription: Ultra extension - for letting winners run in strong parabolic trends
fibonacciLevel.maximumDescription: Maximum target - for extraordinary momentum moves with no resistance

swingRange.title: Swing Range
swingRange.description: Controls which swing highs/lows are used for Fibonacci projection.
swingRange.extendedDescription: Uses the most extreme swing high/low in the lookback — wider targets for bigger moves
swingRange.nearestDescription: Uses the most recent swing high/low — tighter targets for shorter trades

stopMode.title: Initial Stop Placement
stopMode.description: Controls where the initial stop loss is placed.
stopMode.fiboTargetDescription: Places stop at the Fibonacci swing low/high — wider stops for the full move
stopMode.nearestSwingDescription: Places stop at the most recent local swing — tighter stops for shorter risk
stopMode.label: Initial stop placement

entrySettings.title: Entry Settings
entrySettings.description: Configure entry timing and risk/reward filters

entryLevel.description: Controls how far price can move from the pullback level before entry is rejected. 0% = deep pullback only, 100% = breakout, >100% = extended entries beyond breakout.

minRR.longDescription: Minimum risk/reward ratio required for LONG entries
minRR.shortDescription: Minimum risk/reward ratio required for SHORT entries

entrySettings.optimizedNote: Values optimized through extensive backtesting. Entry Level 100% allows breakout entries with trailing stop protection. R:R 0.75 balances opportunity capture with risk management.

chartDrag.title: Chart Order Dragging
chartDrag.dragSlDescription: Allow moving the stop loss by dragging on the chart
chartDrag.slTightenOnlyDescription: Only allow moving the stop loss closer to price (lock in profit / reduce risk)
chartDrag.dragTpDescription: Allow moving the take profit by dragging on the chart

leverage.title: Futures Settings
leverage.description: Configure leverage and margin type for futures trading
leverage.label: Leverage
leverage.warning: Higher leverage increases both potential gains and losses. Use with caution.
leverage.positionModeDescription: One-Way: single direction per symbol. Hedge: simultaneous long and short.
leverage.autoTradingDescription: Default leverage for auto-trading entries on new symbols

filters.title: Trade Filters
filters.description: Enable or disable filters to improve trade quality.

mtf.title: Multi-Timeframe (MTF)
mtf.description: Only trade in the direction of the higher timeframe trend (EMA50/EMA200 Golden/Death Cross).

btcCorrelation.title: BTC Correlation
btcCorrelation.description: Block altcoin trades against BTC trend. LONGs blocked when BTC is bearish, SHORTs blocked when bullish.

marketRegime.title: Market Regime
marketRegime.description: Use ADX to identify trending vs ranging markets. Block trend-following setups in ranging conditions.

trend.title: Short-term Trend (EMA21)
trend.description: Short-term filter: requires a confirmed candle that opened and closed entirely above EMA21 for LONGs, or entirely below for SHORTs. Crossover candles do not count.

direction.title: Long-term Trend (EMA200)
direction.description: Long-term filter: requires a confirmed candle that opened and closed entirely above EMA200 for LONGs, or entirely below for SHORTs. Crossover candles do not count.
direction.enableLongInBearDescription: Override: allow LONG trades in bearish markets
direction.enableShortInBullDescription: Override: allow SHORT trades in bullish markets

momentumTiming.title: Momentum Timing (RSI+MFI)
momentumTiming.description: LONG when RSI>40 and rising with MFI>30. SHORT when RSI<60 and falling with MFI<70.

stochastic.title: Slow Stochastic
stochastic.description: LONG only when oversold (K<20). SHORT only when overbought (K>80).

stochasticRecovery.title: Stochastic Recovery
stochasticRecovery.description: LONG if K went below 20 and hasn't crossed 50. SHORT if K went above 80 and hasn't crossed 50.

stochasticHtf.title: HTF Slow Stochastic
stochasticHtf.description: Same as Slow Stochastic but on one timeframe above (e.g., 1h uses 2h).

stochasticRecoveryHtf.title: HTF Stochastic Recovery
stochasticRecoveryHtf.description: Same as Stochastic Recovery but on one timeframe above (e.g., 1h uses 2h).

volume.title: Volume Confirmation
volume.description: Require volume above average to confirm breakouts and significant moves.

funding.title: Funding Rate (Futures)
funding.description: Block trades with extreme funding rates. High positive blocks LONGs, high negative blocks SHORTs.

confluence.title: Confluence Scoring
confluence.description: Calculate a confluence score from all filters. Only trade when score exceeds minimum threshold.

choppiness.title: Choppiness Index
choppiness.description: Skip trades when market is choppy (CHOP > 61.8). Only trade when trending (CHOP < 38.2).

session.title: Session Filter
session.description: Trade only during high-volume hours (13:00-16:00 UTC, EU-US overlap).

bollingerSqueeze.title: Bollinger Squeeze
bollingerSqueeze.description: Wait for volatility contraction (tight bands) before entry to catch breakouts.

vwap.title: VWAP Filter
vwap.description: LONG only above VWAP, SHORT only below VWAP. Aligns with institutional order flow.

supertrend.title: SuperTrend Filter
supertrend.description: Only trade in the direction of SuperTrend indicator (ATR-based trend detection).

fvg.title: FVG Filter
fvg.description: Only enter trades near unfilled Fair Value Gaps (institutional imbalance zones used as support/resistance).

opportunityCost.title: Opportunity Cost Management
opportunityCost.description: Manage trades that tie up capital without progress.
opportunityCost.enableDescription: Monitor and act on trades taking too long.
opportunityCost.staleThresholdDescription: Consider stale if price moves less than this.
opportunityCost.alertOnlyDescription: Send notification but take no action.

timeBasedTightening.title: Time-Based Stop Tightening
timeBasedTightening.description: Progressively tighten stops as trade ages (when in profit).

pyramiding.title: Position Pyramiding
pyramiding.enableDescription: Allow adding to positions when in profit.
pyramiding.useAdxDesc: Only pyramid in strong trends (ADX above threshold).
pyramiding.useAtrDesc: Use volatility to determine min distance for entries.
pyramiding.useRsiDesc: Avoid pyramiding when RSI is in neutral zones.
pyramiding.leverageAwareDesc: Automatically reduce pyramid size with higher leverage.
pyramiding.fiboLevelsDesc: Select which Fibo extension levels trigger new pyramid entries.
pyramiding.fiboGoldenDesc: Single entry at the golden ratio extension.
pyramiding.fiboConservativeDesc: Two entries at key Fibonacci levels.
pyramiding.fiboAllDesc: Maximum entries at all Fibonacci extensions.

indicators.title: Indicators
indicators.empty: No indicators yet. Click "New" to add one.
indicators.emptyDescription: Click "New" to add your first indicator. Defaults are seeded automatically on first login.
indicators.deleteDescription: Permanently remove "{{label}}". This cannot be undone.
indicators.resetDescription: All custom indicators will be deleted and the default set will be restored.

streamHealth.degradedDescription: No updates received from the exchange — reconnecting automatically.

controls.title: Chart Controls
controls.flipVerticalHelper: Invert the price axis so short-side setups visually move upward.

drawingProperties.notImplemented: No advanced properties for this drawing yet.

welcome.title: Welcome to MarketMind
welcome.description: Your advanced financial chart analysis assistant. MarketMind provides real-time charting with algorithmic trading setup detection to help you make informed trading decisions.

analyze.title: Analyze Market Data
analyze.description: View real-time kline charts, volume indicators, and moving averages. Use the controls to customize your chart view and select different timeframes.

ready.title: Ready to Start
ready.description: Explore the chart controls and settings to customize your trading experience. Enable algorithmic setup detection to automatically identify trading opportunities!

trading.noWalletSelected: No wallet selected. Please create or select a wallet first.

wallets.title: Wallets
wallets.dialogDescription: Connect Binance or Interactive Brokers wallets, plus paper-trading sandboxes for risk-free testing.
wallets.empty: No wallets yet. Create one to start trading.
wallets.emptyReal: No wallets yet. Create a paper trading wallet to test auto-trading.
wallets.realMode: Paper Trading Mode - Create a wallet to test auto-trading without real funds.
wallets.name: Wallet Name
wallets.noTradesYet: No trades yet. Start trading to see your equity curve.
wallets.ibDescription: Requires IB Gateway or TWS running locally.
wallets.testnetDescription: Use testnet to practice with fake funds.
wallets.liveDescription: Live trading uses real funds. Make sure you understand the risks.

ticket.title: Ticket
ticket.noWallet: Please create and select a wallet first.

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.noWallet: Please create and select a wallet first.

orders.title: Orders
orders.noWallet: Please create and select a wallet first.

chartRemoveSlTp.title: Remove {{type}}?
chartRemoveSlTp.description: Removes {{type}} from every order in this position.

mode.title: Trading Mode
mode.label: Mode
mode.autoDescription: Trades are executed automatically when setups are detected.
mode.semiAssistedDescription: Setups are shown as suggestions for manual review and approval.

about.description: A trading assistant that combines advanced financial chart visualization with algorithmic setup detection to provide insights on cryptocurrencies, stocks, and other tradeable assets.

featuresList.autoTrading: Automated trade execution with OCO orders
featuresList.security: Secure API key storage with OS-level encryption

about.copyright: © {{year}} MarketMind. Built with love for traders and investors.

setupConfig.enabledSetupsDescription: Select which trading setups the watchers will monitor

tips.confidence: Higher confidence filters show only the strongest setups
tips.algorithmic: Algorithmic detection is faster and more consistent
tips.toolbar: Enable auto-trading via the robot icon in the toolbar

trendFilter.title: Trend Filter
trendFilter.enableDescription: Use EMA 21 to filter setups by short-term trend direction
trendFilter.allowCounterDescription: When disabled, only trades aligned with the major trend are allowed

setupConfig.autoTradingDisabledDescription: Auto-trading was automatically disabled because setup detection was turned off.
setupConfig.noSetupsEnabledDescription: Cannot enable auto-trading without active setups. Please enable at least one setup in Settings.

setup91.title: Setup 9.1 (EMA9 Reversal)
setup91.description: Detects EMA9 trend changes with volume confirmation - entry on kline that turns EMA9

setup92.title: Setup 9.2 (EMA9 Pullback)
setup92.description: EMA9 trend follower - entry after kline closes below/above previous low/high during uptrend/downtrend

setup93.title: Setup 9.3 (EMA9 Double Pullback)
setup93.description: EMA9 trend follower - entry after 2 consecutive lower/higher closes from reference kline

setup94.title: Setup 9.4 (EMA9 Continuation)
setup94.description: EMA9 continuation - temporary 1-kline EMA9 failure followed by resumption of original trend

bullTrap.title: Bull Trap (Fake Breakout)
bullTrap.description: Detects false breakouts above resistance followed by reversal

bearTrap.title: Bear Trap (Fake Breakdown)
bearTrap.description: Detects false breakdowns below support followed by bounce

breakoutRetest.title: Breakout Retest (Continuation)
breakoutRetest.description: Valid breakout followed by successful retest and continuation

minConfidence.label: Minimum Confidence
minConfidence.helper: Only show setups with confidence above this threshold

tradingProfiles.title: Trading Profiles
tradingProfiles.description: Create profiles with different setup configurations for multi-asset trading
tradingProfiles.dialogDescription: Manage active watchers, trading mode and symbol rotation. Profiles are configured below the watcher list.

fields.name: Profile Name
fields.overrideMaxPositionDescription: Use a custom position size instead of wallet default
fields.overrideMaxConcurrentDescription: Use a custom limit instead of wallet default
fields.setAsDefaultDescription: New watchers will use this profile by default

sections.tradingModeDescription: Override trading execution mode and direction filter
sections.setupsDescription: Select which trading setups this profile will use
sections.filtersDescription: Override trade entry filters for this profile
sections.fibEntryDescription: Override target levels, swing range, and entry settings
sections.minRRDescription: Override minimum R:R ratio for entries
sections.trailingStopDescription: Override trailing stop behavior for this profile
sections.riskManagementDescription: Override position sizing and risk limits
sections.riskDescription: Override wallet risk settings for this profile
sections.checklistDescription: Conditions evaluated before each entry. Required must all pass; preferred contributes to the score.

watchers.title: Active Watchers
watchers.noProfiles: No profiles available. Create a profile first to use custom configurations.
watchers.info: The watcher will scan for setups based on the selected profile's configuration and execute trades automatically when conditions are met.
watchers.futuresWarning: Futures trading involves higher risk due to leverage. Ensure your wallet has Futures API permissions enabled.

emergencyStop.confirmDescription: This will stop all watchers, cancel all open orders, and close all open positions at market price. This action cannot be undone.

dynamicSelection.title: Dynamic Symbol Selection
dynamicSelection.description: Automatically select and rotate symbols based on opportunity scores
dynamicSelection.symbolLimitDescription: Maximum number of symbols to monitor (1-100)
dynamicSelection.rotationIntervalDescription: How often to re-evaluate and rotate symbols
dynamicSelection.infoText: Dynamic selection uses market cap, volume, volatility, and historical performance to identify the best trading opportunities.
dynamicSelection.quickStartDescription: Start watchers for the top symbols by score
dynamicSelection.insufficientCapital: Insufficient capital for minimum trade size

import.title: Import profile from backtest
import.description: Paste a JSON profile from backtest optimization to add it to your saved profiles.

positionSize.title: Exposure & Position Size
positionSize.description: Configure global exposure limit and per-position sizing
positionSize.globalExposureDescription: Maximum total portfolio exposure as percentage of balance
positionSize.sizePercentDescription: Percentage of capital used per position for auto-trading entries
positionSize.manualSizePercentDescription: Percentage of capital used per position for manual orders placed on the chart

trailingStop.title: Trailing Stop
trailingStop.description: Automatically adjust stop loss as price moves in your favor
trailingStop.enabledDescription: Works independently - continues for open positions even when watchers are paused
trailingStop.indicatorIntervalDescription: Timeframe used for trailing stop indicator calculations
trailingStop.activationLongDescription: TP progress required to activate trailing stop for LONG positions
trailingStop.activationShortDescription: TP progress required to activate trailing stop for SHORT positions
trailingStop.profitLockDescription: Lock in a percentage of peak profit (disable to use only ATR and swing trails)
trailingStop.trailingDistanceLongDescription: Percentage of peak profit to lock in for LONG positions
trailingStop.trailingDistanceShortDescription: Percentage of peak profit to lock in for SHORT positions
trailingStop.stopOffsetDescription: Safety distance added to the trailing stop position
trailingStop.stopOffsetModeAutoDescription: Offset adapts automatically based on market volatility (ATR)
trailingStop.stopOffsetModeFixedDescription: Use a fixed offset percentage set via slider
trailingStop.stopOffsetPercentDescription: Fixed safety distance added to the stop position
trailingStop.adaptiveModeDescription: Automatically adjusts based on market volatility

riskManagement.title: Risk Management
riskManagement.description: Configure drawdown limits and margin protection

maxDrawdown.title: Max Drawdown
maxDrawdown.description: Blocks new positions when portfolio drawdown exceeds this limit

maxRiskPerStop.title: Max Risk Per Stop
maxRiskPerStop.description: Filters trades where the potential stop loss exceeds this % of the portfolio

marginTopUp.title: Margin Top-Up
marginTopUp.thresholdDescription: Margin ratio at which top-up is triggered
marginTopUp.amountDescription: Percentage of position margin to add per top-up
marginTopUp.maxCountDescription: Maximum number of margin top-ups allowed per position

autoCancelOrphans.title: Auto-Cancel Orphan Orders
autoCancelOrphans.description: Automatically cancel orders on Binance that have no matching position in the system

watcherManager.pausedDueToCapital: Watchers paused - no free capital for new entries. Will resume when a position is closed.

stockPresets.title: Stock Presets (IB)
stockPresets.description: Quick start watchers for popular US stocks via Interactive Brokers
stockPresets.note: Requires IB Gateway or TWS running locally on port 4001 (live) or 4002 (paper)

lw91.summary: Detects EMA9 trend reversals with volume confirmation
lw91.entry: Enter when EMA9 changes direction and price confirms the reversal
lw91.exit: Stop at recent swing high/low, target based on ATR multiple

lw92.summary: Single-candle pullback during established EMA9 trend
lw92.entry: Enter on breakout of pullback candle after one kline closes against trend
lw92.exit: Stop at pullback low/high, target based on trend continuation

lw93.summary: Two consecutive candles pulling back during EMA9 trend
lw93.entry: Enter on breakout after 2 klines close against the trend direction
lw93.exit: Stop at the lowest/highest point of pullback, trend target

lw94.summary: Temporary 1-kline EMA9 failure followed by trend resumption
lw94.entry: Enter when EMA9 resumes original direction after single-kline failure
lw94.exit: Stop at failure candle low/high, target based on momentum

keltner.summary: Price breakout through Keltner Channel bands
keltner.entry: Enter on close outside Keltner Channel with volume confirmation
keltner.exit: Stop at middle band, target at extended band level

bbBreakout.summary: Bollinger Band squeeze followed by expansion breakout
bbBreakout.entry: Enter when price breaks out of bands after low volatility squeeze
bbBreakout.exit: Stop at opposite band, target based on band expansion

williamsR.summary: Williams %R momentum divergence and oversold/overbought signals
williamsR.entry: Enter on Williams %R reversal from extreme levels with price confirmation
williamsR.exit: Stop at recent swing, target at opposite extreme level

tema.summary: Triple EMA momentum crossover and trend acceleration
tema.entry: Enter when TEMA crosses price with accelerating momentum
tema.exit: Stop at TEMA level, target based on momentum projection

elderRay.summary: Elder Ray Bull/Bear Power divergence with EMA trend filter
elderRay.entry: Enter when power bars diverge from price with EMA confirmation
elderRay.exit: Stop at EMA level, target based on power bar projection

ppo.summary: PPO histogram momentum shifts and zero-line crossovers
ppo.entry: Enter on PPO histogram reversal with signal line confirmation
ppo.exit: Stop at recent swing, target at PPO extreme projection

parabolicSar.summary: Parabolic SAR trend following with acceleration factor
parabolicSar.entry: Enter when SAR flips position with price confirmation
parabolicSar.exit: Trail stop using SAR levels, target at SAR projection

supertrend.summary: Supertrend indicator trend following with ATR-based bands
supertrend.entry: Enter when Supertrend changes direction with volume confirmation
supertrend.exit: Trail stop at Supertrend level, target based on ATR extension

percentB.summary: Percent B mean reversion at Bollinger Band extremes
percentB.entry: Enter when %B reaches extreme and reverses toward middle band
percentB.exit: Stop at band extreme, target at middle band

tripleConf.entry: Enter when 3+ indicators align for reversal at key level
tripleConf.exit: Stop at swing level, target based on measured move

momentumRotation.summary: Sector/asset rotation based on relative momentum strength
momentumRotation.entry: Enter strongest momentum asset when rotation signal triggers
momentumRotation.exit: Exit when relative momentum weakens or rotates away

momentumBreakout.summary: Modern momentum breakout optimized for 2025 market conditions
momentumBreakout.entry: Enter on momentum breakout with multi-timeframe confirmation
momentumBreakout.exit: Trail stop based on momentum decay, target at projection

stochDoubleTouch.summary: Double touch of Stochastic extreme levels with divergence
stochDoubleTouch.entry: Enter on second touch of overbought/oversold with divergence
stochDoubleTouch.exit: Stop at extreme level, target at opposite extreme

qullamBreakout.summary: Kristjan Kullamägi's continuation breakout while price surfs EMA10/20
qullamBreakout.entry: Enter on range expansion breakout with price above rising EMA10/20 and volume confirmation
qullamBreakout.exit: Trail stop with EMA10, target 3x risk or trailing with EMA20
qullamBreakout.candleTrigger: Breakout candle closes above consolidation with volume

qullamHtf.summary: High Tight Flag: 50%+ move followed by shallow pullback (max 25%)
qullamHtf.entry: Enter when price breaks above the tight flag with volume after prior big move
qullamHtf.exit: Stop below the flag, target based on flagpole extension
qullamHtf.candleTrigger: Breakout above flag with increased volume

qullamEp.summary: Episodic Pivot: 5%+ gap with extreme volume on catalyst
qullamEp.entry: Enter when price holds above gap and breaks opening range highs with 2x+ volume
qullamEp.exit: Stop at gap day low, trail with EMA10/20
qullamEp.candleTrigger: Gap day with extreme volume and strong close

chaikinMoneyFlow.summary: Chaikin Money Flow measures buying/selling pressure via volume-weighted price action
chaikinMoneyFlow.entry: Enter when CMF crosses above threshold, indicating money flowing into the asset
chaikinMoneyFlow.exit: Stop based on ATR, exit when CMF crosses below zero or reverses
chaikinMoneyFlow.candleMinus1: Reference candle showing prior money flow direction
chaikinMoneyFlow.candleTrigger: CMF crosses threshold with volume confirmation

chandeMomentum.summary: Chande Momentum Oscillator measures pure momentum between -100 and +100
chandeMomentum.entry: Enter when CMO crosses above oversold level (-50) or below overbought (+50)
chandeMomentum.exit: Stop based on ATR, exit on opposite extreme or zero-line cross
chandeMomentum.candleTrigger: CMO crosses extreme level with momentum shift

connorsRsi2.summary: Larry Connors' proven RSI(2) mean-reversion strategy with 75% historical win rate
connorsRsi2.entry: Enter long when RSI(2) < 5 with price above 200 SMA (uptrend filter)
connorsRsi2.exit: Exit when price closes above 5-day SMA or RSI(2) > 70
connorsRsi2.candleTrigger: RSI(2) drops below 5 with price above 200 SMA

fibonacciRetracement.summary: Classic Fibonacci retracement to key levels (38.2%, 50%, 61.8%) in trending markets
fibonacciRetracement.entry: Enter at Fibonacci support/resistance levels with price action confirmation
fibonacciRetracement.exit: Stop below next Fibonacci level, target at previous swing high/low
fibonacciRetracement.candleTrigger: Price reaches and bounces from Fibonacci level

goldenCross.summary: Classic SMA 50/200 crossover signaling long-term trend changes
goldenCross.entry: Enter when SMA 50 crosses above SMA 200 (Golden Cross) with volume
goldenCross.exit: Exit on Death Cross (SMA 50 below SMA 200) or trailing stop
goldenCross.candleTrigger: SMA 50 crosses above SMA 200 confirming bullish trend

keltnerSqueeze.summary: Volatility squeeze when Bollinger Bands contract inside Keltner Channels
keltnerSqueeze.entry: Enter on breakout after squeeze releases with momentum confirmation
keltnerSqueeze.exit: Stop at middle band, target based on volatility expansion
keltnerSqueeze.candleTrigger: Breakout from squeeze with volume expansion

mfiDivergence.summary: Money Flow Index combines RSI logic with volume for stronger signals
mfiDivergence.entry: Enter when MFI crosses above 20 (oversold) or below 80 (overbought)
mfiDivergence.exit: Stop based on ATR, exit on opposite extreme or divergence
mfiDivergence.candleTrigger: MFI crosses extreme with volume confirmation

rsiOversoldBounce.summary: RSI mean-reversion capturing bounces from oversold conditions
rsiOversoldBounce.entry: Enter when RSI(14) crosses above 30 after being oversold
rsiOversoldBounce.exit: Stop at recent swing low, target at RSI 50-70 zone
rsiOversoldBounce.candleMinus2: Strong selling pushing RSI into oversold

rsiSmaFilter.summary: RSI mean-reversion with SMA 200 trend filter for higher probability trades
rsiSmaFilter.entry: Enter RSI oversold when price is above SMA 200 (bullish bias)
rsiSmaFilter.exit: Stop below recent swing, exit when RSI reaches 50-70
rsiSmaFilter.candleTrigger: RSI oversold with price above SMA 200 trend filter

descriptions.top-gainers: Biggest price gainers in the last 24h
descriptions.top-losers: Biggest price losers in the last 24h
descriptions.btc-decorrelated: Assets with low BTC correlation and positive momentum
descriptions.oversold-uptrend: RSI oversold while price holds above key EMAs
descriptions.overbought-downtrend: RSI overbought while price is below key EMAs
descriptions.momentum-leaders: Strong trending assets with high ADX and volume
descriptions.breakout-candidates: Tight Bollinger Bands with rising volume
descriptions.mean-reversion: Extreme RSI readings for potential reversals
descriptions.high-volatility: High ATR% with strong volume and trend
descriptions.best-for-scalping: High liquidity, moderate volatility — ideal for scalping
descriptions.cci-scalping-long: CCI oversold with high liquidity — look for EMA cross long entry
descriptions.cci-scalping-short: CCI overbought with high liquidity — look for EMA cross short entry

results.empty: No results found. Try adjusting your filters.

saveScreener.description: Save the current filter configuration for quick access.

futures.extremeRiskWarning: Extreme risk! Liquidation can happen quickly with small price movements.
futures.highRiskWarning: High leverage increases both potential profits and losses.
futures.reverseConfirmDescription: Closes {{side}} {{quantity}} {{symbol}} and opens {{newSide}} {{quantity}} {{symbol}} at market price.
futures.closePositionConfirmDescription: Closes {{side}} {{quantity}} {{symbol}} at market price and cancels all related orders (SL, TP, pending entries).
futures.cancelOrdersConfirmDescription: Cancels all pending entry orders for {{symbol}}. SL and TP orders are kept.
futures.liquidated: Position would be liquidated at current price!
futures.liquidationWarning: Warning: Position is close to liquidation.
futures.marginTypeInfo: Isolated: Each position has its own margin. Crossed: All positions share margin.
futures.isolatedDesc: Recommended: Risk is limited to the margin assigned to this position.
futures.crossedDesc: All available balance is used as margin. Higher liquidation risk.

panels.organizeConfirmDescription: This will rearrange all panels in the active layout using the "{{algo}}" pattern. Their current positions will be lost.
